title: Portland Trail Blazers

Portland Trail Blazers

Stub. NBA franchise in Portland, Oregon. Yahir attended a "fully escorted" Blazers game in Dec 2023 via a scholarship-comped experience (per 2023 year recap); follow-up gratitude email to host Adrianna in 2023 12 31 trail blazers thank you.
